grant_title: Massachusetts Awards $11.3 Million to Advance Ocean Technology Innovation
geographic_restrictions: Primarily focused on Massachusetts, with emphasis on South Coast, Cape Cod, and the North Shore regions.
project_area: Ocean technology innovation, including underwater drones, smart buoys, marine sensors, tidal energy, wave energy, and marine genomics.
demographic_requirements: No specific demographic requirements mentioned; focus on supporting local businesses, startups, and researchers in Massachusetts.
eligibility_summary: Open to organizations in Massachusetts involved in ocean technology innovation, including small businesses, startups, research institutions, and non-profits. Priority given to projects that foster collaboration, expand testing facilities, and support entrepreneurship in marine science and technology.
